findings.summary: git stash pop after worktree merges pulled 40+ unrelated files, false merge conflict
findings.evidence: stash contained WIP from other sessions, contaminated dashboard.py merge
findings.proposed_fix: Rule: never git stash when merging worktree branches. Commit or reset first.

findings.summary: token-baseline.py timed out at 90s — seq+1 join across 7.7GB/2.5M events
findings.evidence: timeout 60 exit 124, required query rewrite to avoid cross-event joins
findings.proposed_fix: Add runlogs query guide to codebase-map.md: use LIMIT+ORDER BY, avoid cross-event joins

findings.summary: Cross-repo hook deployment is 3 manual steps (staging → skills/hooks → settings.json)
findings.evidence: 3 cp + Edit commands per hook × 3 hooks = 9 manual steps
findings.proposed_fix: just deploy-hook recipe: copy, chmod, generate settings.json block

findings.summary: Exa results double-encoded in overflow files, first parse failed
findings.evidence: tool-results/ files 87K-1M chars with stringified JSON inside JSON array
findings.proposed_fix: Recurring (2026-03-20). posttool-research-reformat handles MCP but not Exa overflow.

findings.summary: bash-poll hook blocked reading actively-written background task output
